# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: envoy.solo.io/v1alpha1
kind: EnvoyProxy
metadata:
  name: envoy-edge-proxy
spec:
  admin:
    access_policy_files:
      - filename: envoy_access_policy.yaml
    address: 127.0.0.1:8001
  inlineConfig:
    access_loggers:
      - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.access_loggers.stdout.v2.StdoutAccessLoggerConfig
    stats_sinks:
      - name: envoy.stats_sinks.statsd
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.stats_sinks.statsd.v3.StatsdSinkConfig
          address: 127.0.0.1:8125
          prefix: envoy.edge.proxy
    listeners:
      - name: admin
        address:
          socket_address:
            address: 127.0.0.1
            port_value: 8001
        filter_chains:
          - filters:
              - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                  stat_prefix: ingress_http
                  route_config:
                    name: local_route
                    virtual_hosts:
                      - name: admin
                        domains:
                          - "*"
                        routes:
                          - match:
                              prefix: "/"
                            route:
                              cluster: admin
      - name: stats_server
        address:
          socket_address:
            address: 127.0.0.1
            port_value: 8125
        listener_filters:
          - name: envoy.listener_filters.tls_inspector
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.listener_filters.tls_inspector.v3.TlsInspectorConfig
    clusters:
      - name: admin
        connect_timeout: 0.25s
        type: static
        lb_policy: round_robin
        load_assignment:
          cluster_name: admin
          endpoints:
            - address:
                socket_address:
                  address: 127.0.0.1
                  port_value: 8001
